name: Vegetable Sunburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium-size bowl, combine all ingredients and shape into patties.
3. Arrange the patties in an oiled shallow baking dish.
4. Bake until brown on top for about 15 minutes.
5. Turn the patties over and bake until the reverse sides are brown for 10-15 more minutes.
